creator: william88@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Just wanted to tell you that sysutils/freeipmi is build just fine for me:

FreeBSD venon 10.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #1 r246120: Wed Jan 30
17:57:30 BRST 2013     root@venon:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/VENON  amd64

FreeBSD clang version 3.2 (tags/RELEASE_32/final 170710) 20121221
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd10.0
Thread model: posix

Myabe it has already been fixed and can be closed.


-- 
William Grzybowski
------------------------------------------
Curitiba/PR - Brasil
